gate_description: review-ready 10K plan must include at least one non-support development or explicit 10K endpoint identity
10K plan must surface explicit 10K completion, checkpoint, or test outcome in generated rows or review-visible metadata
notes: metadata alone is not enough if output rows stay generic

gate_description: 2-day 10K must show a recurring development motif across the horizon
notes: acceptable motifs include progression, strides, tempo-lite, or checkpoint weeks

gate_description: 3-5 day 10K must show clear 10K-oriented development before the endpoint week
notes: support-only calendars are not acceptable under a 10K label

gate_description: half plan must include a visible half-readiness marker
notes: marker may be threshold durability, readiness week, or long-run specificity endpoint

gate_description: stronger half variants must include at least one half-specific identity beyond easy/steady/long support
notes: controlled tempo, threshold durability, or steady-finish long run qualify

gate_description: 4-5 day half plans must include threshold durability or an equivalent half-specific marker
notes: prevents balanced half from reading like generic support mileage

gate_description: marathon plan must end with a visible base endpoint and must not imply race peak readiness
notes: endpoint copy must stay honest as base

gate_description: marathon plan must include marathon_steady_specificity or long-run specificity
notes: generic support-only marathon is not acceptable

gate_description: 3-day marathon must preserve easy or recovery after the long run and avoid compression
shipped presets must not contain two specific touches in the same week
notes: steady-finish long run counts as the week's specific touch

gate_description: next running slot after long run must be recovery or easy in conservative variants
plans long enough to load must include visible cutback weeks
notes: cutback cannot be hidden as a normal support week

gate_description: every non-rest workout must expose numeric segment anatomy or repeat structure
numeric pace targets require benchmark-backed pace truth and must not come from target_time alone
notes: watch support alone does not unlock pace

gate_description: executable HR targets require personal HR-zone truth; age-estimated HR stays advisory only
notes: default HR cannot present as personal target truth

gate_description: when pace or HR truth is missing, workouts must remain executable via structure_only_executable anatomy
notes: missing truth does not justify vague workouts
